ai_summary: India Glycols Limited announced that the National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT) has sanctioned its Scheme of Arrangement, enabling the demerger of its Bio Pharma and Spirits & Biofuel undertakings into two new entities: Ennature Bio Pharma Limited and IGL Spirits Limited, respectively. This significant corporate restructuring aims to create more focused businesses and potentially unlock shareholder value through the strategic separation of core segments. The NCLT approval represents a key regulatory milestone for this realignment, with no immediate red flags identified.
